reasoning: The control AU-12 (3) focuses on generating audit records for changes made by authorized individuals. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved through audit logging, which captures API server requests and responses, including those made by authorized users. The audit policy can be configured to capture metadata about these changes. Additionally, RBAC can be used to ensure that only authorized users can make changes, and their actions are logged.
title: Audit Record Generation | Changes by Authorized Individuals
